input.contract: {"goal":"Export nightly orders to the warehouse","outputSpec":"One CSV file per day in s3://warehouse/orders/","acceptanceCriteria":[{"text":"Exported rows match the orders table for the day","blocking":true,"verification":"row-count reconciliation job"}],"inputs":[{"name":"ordersTable","required":true,"source":"postgres prod orders"}],"sideEffects":[{"name":"s3 write","approval":true}],"reportSpec":"markdown summary posted to the data channel"}

metadata.criterion: A complete contract scores 100 with every check ok. Calibration case: must always pass.

input.contract: {"outputSpec":"One CSV file per day in s3://warehouse/orders/","acceptanceCriteria":[{"text":"Exported rows match the orders table","blocking":true,"verification":"reconciliation job"}],"inputs":[{"name":"ordersTable","required":true,"source":"postgres prod orders"}],"sideEffects":[{"name":"s3 write","approval":true}],"reportSpec":"markdown summary"}

metadata.criterion: A missing goal is flagged as an error and costs one check.
An empty contract fails the three core checks and scores 43.
Unparseable JSON scores 0 with a parse error.
A non-object top level scores 0 with a parse error.
A blocking criterion without verification is an error.

input.contract: {"goal":"Notify customers of renewals","outputSpec":"Renewal emails sent","acceptanceCriteria":[{"text":"Each expiring account gets exactly one email","blocking":true,"verification":"send-log audit"}],"inputs":[{"name":"accounts","required":true,"source":"billing db"}],"sideEffects":[{"name":"sends customer email"}],"reportSpec":"send summary"}

metadata.criterion: A side effect without an approval gate is a warning.
A required input without a source is an error.

metadata.criterion: Each fix is paired to the check id it resolves, so remediation is verifiable.

input.contract: {"goal":"Ship the importer","outputSpec":"Importer in prod","acceptanceCriteria":["responds within 100ms","never corrupts existing data"],"inputs":[],"sideEffects":[],"reportSpec":"launch report"}

metadata.criterion: Plain-string criteria cannot declare blocking or verification, so the checker flags them instead of silently passing.
